generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are increasingly relying on us for defense, while our own infrastructure remains vulnerable? A recent report shows that 65% of our partners expect us to take the lead in regional security, yet only 30% of Americans feel prepared for a major crisis. It's time to strengthen our alliances and ensure we're ready to protect our interests and values. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
